title: Echo of the Farlands
description: the farlands are back and fully customizable
body:
Undoes the original beta 1.8 Farlands patch and injects code that allows for the farlands to be scaled, moved, and manipulated. 

showcase:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BQlVYS1P-Xg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

select the distance and scaling type from the world creation screen, the distances are standard (10k, 50k, 100k, 1m, and original 12,550,823)
![world create screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/312e31869d5db8567b073a47a0016c6a4cea731b_0.webp)

There is a config option which uses the custom config value, it can be anything and set from the main menu mods tab or the config file (useful for servers).
![config page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c50f64e34315742fa3144ce19121c0b190638cc_0.webp)

scaling changes how the farlands progresses. unscaled is vanilla and unchanged, the others compress the terrain allowing for things like the fartherlands, corner fartherlands, and other generation glitches to appear within the world border rather than billions of blocks out. 
![fartherlands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fba6eb5b1ea0ff0859a08c298259cb246eb93fd1_0.webp)
(fartherlands at 2.25 million blocks out in exponential scale/wall distance 10,000)
